flows.title: Buyer funnel
flows.description: Front page to a configurator-ready machine page. Navigation is organized by buyer intent (aware → consider → decide → own), not by catalog.

steps.detail: Lands on the homepage; picks a buyer-intent nav bucket.
Choose Your Machine: instant grid of every machine.
Narrows by category: all machines, roof/wall panel, or seamless gutter roll-up.
Opens a machine page (WooCommerce product; Q3 / Mark 2 get the full pillar treatment).
Pricing, specs, and media come from the per-machine data files in git.
Guided path ends at the theme CTAs: Open Configurator (external Corbel) or Explore Financing.

flows.title: Lead capture
flows.description: Every lead surface routes into HubSpot forms rendered through one helper module. Self-serve leads; the form is the catch-all.

steps.detail: Reaches a lead surface: Lead Form Landing template, front-page contact band, or a specialist CTA.
Template renders the embedded HubSpot form via app/inc/hubspot.php.
Same helper powers the Finance Center specialist form and other HubSpot embeds; submissions land in HubSpot CRM.

flows.title: Service request
flows.description: Owner-support path: Service Hub landing → dedicated search results → service request form. Search posts plain GET; no AJAX.

steps.detail: Opens /service-hub/: machine directory, troubleshooting sections, search lead-in.
Search lead-in hands off to /service-hub/search/ (page row captured by scripts/db/026).
Results and Machine-first filters come from the service-scoped query layer (curated machine map, department-ANDed counts).
If self-serve content doesn't resolve it, the owner files a service request (HubSpot form).

flows.title: Learning Center consumption
flows.description: Education path for buyers and owners: filtered content library to a single article with a generated table of contents.

steps.detail: Browses /learning-center/ (posts page): hero, sections by post type, category + machine-tag filters.
Opens an article; TableOfContents.js builds the on-page rail from the H2s.
Article CTAs and machine tags route readers back into the buyer funnel.

flows.title: Finance Center
flows.description: How-to-buy path: educate on financing, then either configure/quote or talk to a human. Deliberately replaces dumping users straight into the configurator.

steps.detail: Opens /machines/leasing-financing/ (template + hero video wired by scripts/db/022).
Self-serve path: lender options and the external Corbel configurator for a quote.
Human path: Talk-to-a-specialist closing section with phone + HubSpot lead form.

flows.title: Agent orientation
flows.description: How a new agent gets from project knowledge to the code surface it likely needs.

steps.detail: Read the architecture source of truth.
Find the executable or application entrypoint.
Follow requests, routes, or commands into implementation code.

flows.title: Validation
flows.description: The default check path before review or mainline landing.

steps.detail: Run the project validation command.
